text.title: AGENTS.md Templates by Project Type
text.summary: Backend, frontend, infra, and library AGENTS.md section requirements — what to include per type beyond the universal shape.

rule.statement: Backend AGENTS.md must include: Models table (model → purpose), Services table (function → purpose), API Endpoints table (method/path → purpose), key config vars.

example.note: Backend AGENTS.md extras: models table, services, endpoints, and where to find Django settings/celery/urls.

rule.statement: Frontend AGENTS.md must include: Components table, state management location and pattern, routing table (path → component), and build commands.
Infra AGENTS.md must include: Resources table (file → what it creates), Environments table (env → description), key commands (apply, plan, destroy), and secrets management note.
Library AGENTS.md must include: Public API table (function/class → purpose), usage example, version constraints, and breaking-change history if any.

section.title: Universal Required Sections

list.item: Gotchas — from comments and fix commits

section.reference: Universal AGENTS.md template with all required sections
